/usr/bin/g++ -Wl,-rpath -Wl,/usr/local/openmpi/lib -Wl,--enable-new-dtags CMakeFiles/test_dispatch.dir/test/test_dispatch.cu.o CMakeFiles/test_dispatch.dir/cmake_device_link.o -o test_dispatch   -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/workspace/nvshmem_install/lib:/usr/local/openmpi/lib:/usr/local/cuda-12.9/targets/x86_64-linux/lib libbalance_ep_core.a /usr/local/openmpi/lib/libmpi.so /usr/local/cuda-12.9/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcudart.so /workspace/nvshmem_install/lib/libnvshmem_host.so.3.5.19 /workspace/nvshmem_install/lib/libnvshmem_device.a /usr/local/cuda-12.9/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcudart_static.a -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
